description: Numerical country identification code assigned by the Growth Lab
notes: Augmented version of UN M49 codes.
Augmented version of ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 codes.

description: Shortened English name of country (where applicable)
notes: This value may be the same as country name.

description: Numerical geographic group identification code assigned by the Growth Lab

notes: Provides the group ID of the immediate parent for the selected group one level of analysis higher when applicable.

description: Numerical product ID code assigned by the Growth Lab
notes: Product IDs are valid only within their classification. The same product IDs are used in different classifications to refer to different products.

description: Product code for unilateral services assigned by the Growth Lab
Product level corresponding to number of digits in respective product code
Shortened English name of product (where applicable)
notes: This value may be the same as product_name.
Provides the product ID of the immediate parent for the selected product one level of analysis higher. This is not provided for products at the highest level (1 digit).

description: Product hierarchy for a given product
notes: Formatted as a string containing product IDs separated by periods from highest level (1 digit) to the selected product's ID through the complete parental relationship chain.

description: Country included in Growth Projections and ECI rankings
notes: Flags if a country meets trade volume, population, and data quality requirements to be included in current Growth Lab rankings analysis.
Flags a country where data previously exists but country no longer shows as an active country.
Not all products are recommended in feasibility analysis for a variety of reasons (such as trade discrepencies, natural resource requirements, etc.).
Flags if a product is considered a resource that may occur naturally which is controlled for in various analyses.
Represents if a product is considered a Green Enabler in the Atlas.
